RESOURCE_VIEW_CACHE_TTL.description: TTL in seconds for the view-result cache in apply_view(). 0 disables caching.

ONLINE_WINDOW_MINUTES.description: Presence window (minutes) for the 'currently online' count: a session with a heartbeat within this window counts as online. Frontend heartbeat cadence is 5 min, so ~3 missed beats (15 min) is the default. Added by query-arch B-1.

ACTIVE_WINDOW_MINUTES.description: Engagement window (minutes) for GA-style 'active users (last N min)'. Added by query-arch B-1.

METRICS_HISTORY_INTERVAL.description: Metrics-snapshot cadence in seconds for MetricsHistoryCollector. Surfaced in /admin/api/system-status so the admin UI aligns its auto-refresh poll. Added by query-arch B-2.

METRICS_HISTORY_RETENTION_DAYS.description: Days of metrics_history snapshots to retain. Added by query-arch B-2.

METRICS_HISTORY_MAX_ROWS.description: Max metrics_history rows retained before pruning. Added by query-arch B-2.

DUCKDB_JOB_DIR.description: Directory for transient per-job DuckDB files created by BaseChunkedDuckDBJob. Default is sibling of QUERY_SPOOL_DIR default (tmp/query_spool/../duckdb_jobs = tmp/duckdb_jobs). Use an absolute path on a named volume in Docker. Must not overlap with QUERY_SPOOL_DIR. Added by unified-query-core-infra.

EAP_ALARM_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified EapAlarmJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob). Default 'on' (AC-1 parity tests pass). When 'on'/'true'/'1', enqueues via enqueue_query_job + EapAlarmJob with always-async 503 decision tree (sync_fallback_allowed=False). When 'off'/'false'/'0', falls back to legacy run_eap_alarm_query_job. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

PRODUCTION_HISTORY_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified ProductionHistoryJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, P2 migration). Default 'on'. When 'on'/'true'/'1', production_history route enqueues via enqueue_query_job('production_history_unified') with sync_fallback_allowed=True; always_async=False. When 'off'/'false'/'0', legacy pandas BQE path. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

REJECT_HISTORY_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified RejectHistoryJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, P2 migration). Default 'on'. When 'on'/'true'/'1', reject_history route enqueues via enqueue_query_job('reject_unified') with sync_fallback_allowed=True; always_async=False; requires_cross_chunk_reduction=True. When 'off'/'false'/'0', legacy enqueue_reject_query path. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

RESOURCE_HISTORY_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified ResourceHistoryBaseJob + ResourceHistoryOeeJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, P3 migration). Default 'on'. When 'on'/'true'/'1', export route enqueues two RQ jobs (always_async=True, sync_fallback_allowed=False); degraded → 503. When 'off'/'false'/'0', legacy export_csv Oracle read + iterrows path. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

MATERIAL_TRACE_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified MaterialTraceJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, P4 migration). Default 'on'. When 'on'/'true'/'1', material-trace query route enqueues via enqueue_query_job('material-trace-unified') with always_async=True and sync_fallback_allowed=False; async unavailable -> 503 (no sync fallback). When 'off'/'false'/'0', legacy _execute_batched_query_to_parquet path. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

DOWNTIME_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified DowntimeJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, P5 migration). Default 'on'. When 'on'/'true'/'1', downtime-analysis route enqueues via enqueue_query_job('downtime-unified') with always_async=True and sync_fallback_allowed=False. When 'off'/'false'/'0', legacy _bridge_jobid Path B pd.merge via execute_downtime_query_job. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

QUERY_TOOL_USE_RQ.description: Feature flag enabling RQ async dispatch for query-tool equipment-period endpoint. Default 'on' (pool-manager wiring complete 2026-06-20). When 'on'/'true'/'1' and classify_query_cost returns ASYNC (date span ≥ 30 days), route enqueues via enqueue_query_job('query-tool') and returns 202+job_id. When 'off'/'false'/'0', inline sync path. Fail-open: RQ unavailable falls through to sync.

WIP_WORKER_QUEUE.description: RQ queue name for WIP detail async jobs. Must match --queues arg of the running WIP detail worker. Default 'wip-detail-query'. Added by wip-rq-worker-chunks-cleanup.

WIP_JOB_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Maximum seconds a single RQ WIP detail job may run. Positive integer string. Default '1800'. Added by wip-rq-worker-chunks-cleanup.

WIP_SPOOL_TTL.description: Redis spool metadata TTL (seconds) for WIP detail queries. Default '72000' (20h). Added by wip-rq-worker-chunks-cleanup.

PRODUCTION_ACHIEVEMENT_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag gating registration of the ProductionAchievementJob worker/job-type (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, chunk_strategy=TIME, requires_cross_chunk_reduction=False with a re-aggregating post_aggregate; ADR-0016). Default 'on'. Unlike the other *_USE_UNIFIED_JOB flags, there is no legacy code path behind 'off' (clean pre-launch replacement, no dual-path fallback) -- 'off' is a pure kill switch: the job type is not registered, so a spool-miss on GET /api/production-achievement/report returns 503 (always_async=True, sync_fallback_allowed=False). A spool-hit request still succeeds with the flag off. Added by production-achievement-async-spool.

PRODUCTION_ACHIEVEMENT_WORKER_QUEUE.description: RQ queue name for production-achievement async jobs. Must match --queues arg of the running mes-dashboard-production-achievement-worker.service process. Default 'production-achievement-query'. Added by production-achievement-async-spool.

PRODUCTION_ACHIEVEMENT_JOB_TIMEOUT_SECON.description: Maximum seconds a single RQ production-achievement job may run. Positive integer string. Default '1800'. Added by production-achievement-async-spool.

MYSQL_OPS_POOL_SIZE.description: SQLAlchemy QueuePool pool_size for the shared MySQL OPS engine (core/mysql_client.py). Previously hardcoded to 3. Raised to make it configurable after concurrent callers (admin log/metrics UI, sync_worker, permission checks, target/KPI services) saturated the fixed 5-connection pool and hit QueuePool TimeoutError. Added by mysql-ops-pool-sizing-fix.

MYSQL_OPS_MAX_OVERFLOW.description: SQLAlchemy QueuePool max_overflow for the shared MySQL OPS engine (core/mysql_client.py). Previously hardcoded to 2. Combined capacity is MYSQL_OPS_POOL_SIZE + MYSQL_OPS_MAX_OVERFLOW. Added by mysql-ops-pool-sizing-fix.

MYSQL_OPS_ENABLED.description: Master feature flag gating direct MySQL OPS read/write paths (core/mysql_client.py). Default 'false'. Must be 'true' in production for the production-achievement target-value and edit-permission tables to function (write endpoints return 503 when false; read endpoints degrade target_qty/achievement_rate to null). Pre-existing var, newly documented by production-achievement-kanban.
